title: Package Guard Backup Data
description: Schema for pi-pkg-guard backup files containing npm package lists and exclusion preferences

$schema.description: Reference to this JSON schema. Accepts any pi-pkg-guard version tag or main branch.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the backup was created

npmPackages.description: List of packages installed globally via npm that should be registered with pi

items.description: Package name (plain or with npm: prefix for scoped packages)

excludedPackages.description: Optional list of packages to exclude from orphan detection

items.description: Package name to exclude from detection
